Every task (T-001..T-011) has a non-empty Requirements: field citing real REQ-NNN identifiers from requirements.md. No orphan tasks.

Round 2 (not round 1): all 11 tasks show Approval: Draft (not Approved) and Status: Planned (one of the allowed Planned/In Progress/Blocked values).

All 11 tasks declare valid Risk (medium x2: T-001,T-008; high x7: T-002,T-003,T-004,T-005,T-006,T-007,T-009,T-010; low x1: T-011) paired correctly per risk-gate-matrix (medium->acceptance-first, high->tdd, low->test-after). Each AC-NNN (verified via grep with per-task attribution) is claimed as primary Done-When target by exactly one task; no AC-ID appears under two different tasks' Requirements/Done-When as a duplicate primary target.

Every task ID referenced in a Blockers field (T-001..T-010, referenced across various tasks) exists in tasks.md and in dependency-graph.json nodes array (T-001..T-011). No dangling blocker references.
BLOCKERS-FORMAT is PASS, so this check runs. DFS traversal over all 22 edges in dependency-graph.json found no revisited node on any path; no cycle exists.

All '+'-joined titles/scopes combine a primary implementation artifact with its directly-coupled companion module or verification work within the same concern (e.g. T-002 github-client + its paired error-normalizer for the same upstream-call concern; T-003 auth resolution + scrubbing + its dedicated no-secrets test; T-008 dist build + its CI parity job + smoke test, all verifying the same deployment artifact; T-011 docs + traceability finalization as mandatory housekeeping). No task joins two unrelated feature concerns.

All Done-When items across all 11 tasks name concrete, inspectable evidence: specific AC-ID criteria with exact expected values/behavior (e.g. T-002: 'HTTP メソッドが GET 固定で、ホストが api.github.com に固定される(単体で検証)'), named test/evidence artifacts (Red->Green evidence, evidence bundle, reports/implementation/ci-mcp-T-NNN.md), or exact file/section targets for documentation-only T-011 (README/USERGUIDE content items, traceability.md addendum). No forbidden vague verbs ('ensure', 'consider', 'works correctly', 'verify is correct', bare 'update X') found via grep.

Task IDs in traceability.md Task->REQ table are exactly T-001..T-011, matching tasks.md's T-001..T-011 with no dangling references either direction. Every REQ-ID in traceability.md exists in requirements.md. Full-profile layer anchors present: each REQ-NNN row cites either a canonical <layer>-spec.md#<section> anchor (e.g. REQ-001 -> security-spec.md#trust-boundaries; infra-spec.md#deployment-topology) or a reasoned 'N/A — cross-layer only: <reason>' value (e.g. REQ-002, REQ-004, REQ-008, REQ-012, REQ-013); cited anchors refer to the hash-bound security-spec.md/infra-spec.md documents in the manifest.
